items.title: AvePoint (AVPT): Valuation Perspectives After Strong Earnings, Raised Guidance, and Strategic Microsoft Partnership
items.description: AvePoint (AVPT) just delivered a notable update for investors, announcing strong quarterly earnings with significant increases in revenue and profit compared to the previous year. The company also raised its full-year guidance, signaling renewed momentum. See our latest analysis for AvePoint. Despite posting standout earnings and forming a strategic partnership with a key Microsoft channel group, AvePoint’s share price has pulled back recently, dropping over 20% in the past month and sitting...

items.title: What IREN (IREN)'s Landmark Microsoft AI Cloud Deal Means For Shareholders
items.description: Microsoft recently announced a multi-year US$9.7 billion agreement with IREN Limited to access Nvidia GB300 GPUs through phased deployments at IREN's Texas data center campus, supported by a related US$5.8 billion procurement agreement for GPUs and equipment with Dell Technologies. This development highlights IREN's successful shift from cryptocurrency mining to AI cloud infrastructure, positioning the company as a significant partner for global technology leaders seeking advanced,...
